details.message: MetricAnalysis produced no bottleneck classification or metrics
MetricAnalysis output is unstructured — Verification may struggle

details.error: Verification rejected: Verdict: REJECT; Findings: [Missing measurements for l2_cache_size_mb and actual_boost_clock_mhz]; Concerns: [Only dram_latency_cycles was measured out of three requested targets. The measurement pipeline failed to complete the full measurement suite.]; The verification shows that only 1 out of 3 requested targets was measured. The requested targets were ['dram_latency_cycles', 'l2_cache_size_mb', 'actual_boost_clock_mhz'], but only dram_latency_cycles (451.0 cycles) was successfully measured. Two targets are completely missing from the results.; While the measured dram_latency_cycles value of 451 cycles falls within the expected GPU DRAM latency range (300-1000 cycles), the incomplete measurement set violates the completeness requirement. According to the verification protocol, if any requested target is missing from measurements, the verdict must be REJECT.; The pipeline appears to have encountered execution failures (as evidenced by the emergency stall recovery messages and failed tool calls) that prevented completion of the full measurement suite.
